channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Left-turn prohibition sign missing, 14th April
item.description:
At the junction of Portland Street and Clarence Road northbound, the no left turn sign is missing on the sign traffic light array shown here. This is resulting in drivers turning left and into a cross where pedestrians have signal priority. Https://maps.app.goo.gl/P1Q1C6T5aE3518QC8
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Clarence Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: The traffic light has been vandalised

item.title: Potholes in speed bumps, 14th April
item.description:
Both speed bumps are disintegrating at the sides creating large potholes in road surface
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 117, Arle Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 14th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please relay x1 raised rocking 400x600x24mm slab number 1 (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 14th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure 28 day please replace x1 broken sunken rocking 900x600x22mm slab number 3 (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 14th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 14th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure 28 day please remove slab and tarmac up to raised concrete to cover. 1500x800x20mm stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 14th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure 28 day please replace x1 broken raised rocking 600x600x20mm slab number 2 (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One of the traffic lanes has been closed causing havoc with traffic, 14th April
item.description:
Traffic lights on Barnwood Road. The edge of the pavement has been dug up right by the Barnwood Road traffic lights and the inside lane has been closed. This means that traffic is building up because the traffic lights only allow cars to turn right or go straight ahead at different times due to a separate filter for North Upton lane. Some cars are going round the queue in frustration.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, North Upton Lane, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 14th April
item.description:
Please could you raise a Safety Inspection for Pittville Lawn, Cheltenham (both sections please). We have received reports from the County Councillor regarding a lot of potholes and deteriorating surface. Many thanks,
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 14th April
item.description:
2 hr cw pothole 2000x900x90mm approx Stop and go (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken kerb stone, 14th April
item.description:
Lowered kerb stone broken and rocking at entrance to driveway of 9 Peregrine Road, Cheltenham, GL530LW

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Peregrine Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 14th April
item.description:
Fw abrupt level 308x300x26mm Stats required Give and take (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 14th April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please lift and relay x2 rocking sunken half kerb stone 600x100x40mm (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
